user.title: Connect to Checkmk
user.description: Enter the URL of your Checkmk site and the credentials of an automation user.

data_description.url: Base URL of the Checkmk site, e.g. https://monitoring.example.com/mysite
data_description.username: Name of a Checkmk user with an automation secret
data_description.password: The automation secret of that user

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Checkmk
reauth_confirm.description: The stored credentials are no longer valid. Enter them again.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Checkmk site.

abort.already_configured: This Checkmk site is already configured.

data.create_metric_sensors: Create sensors for service performance metrics
